ast.source: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
ast.target: 您有未保存的更改。您想怎么做？

ast.name: title
ast.source: Total directed hours for this entire INSET period
ast.target: 此整个培训日期间的定向总时长

ast.source: Delete subject and all its classes
ast.target: 删除科目及其所有班级

ast.name: title
ast.target: 此活动的默认时长（分钟）

ast.source: First day of the holiday/INSET period

ast.name: title
ast.source: Last day of the holiday/INSET period (same as start = single day)
ast.target: 假期/培训期的最后一天（与开始日期相同则为单日）

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Remove all holidays and INSET days?
ast.target: 移除所有假期和培训日？

ast.name: error
ast.source: The Numbers writer currently writes only the first table
ast.target: Numbers写入器目前仅写入第一个表格

ast.name: error
ast.target: 操作系统文件夹选择器失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Teacher Planner: flushPendingSave on settings hide failed.
ast.target: 教师计划：在设置隐藏时刷新待保存项失败。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Teacher Planner: loadSettings() failed — loading with defaults.
ast.target: 教师计划：loadSettings()失败 — 正在使用默认设置加载。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Teacher Planner: flushPendingSave on unload failed.
ast.target: 教师计划器：卸载时刷新待保存失败。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Teacher Planner: runPlannerMigrations() failed on planner switch.
ast.target: 教师计划器：切换计划器时运行迁移失败。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 教师计划器：防抖保存设置失败。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 例如：第1节课、课间休息、午餐

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Track cumulative directed time based on events in your planner.
ast.target: 根据计划器中的事件跟踪累积指导时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum directed time for a full-time teacher. Default: 1265 (STPCD).
ast.target: 全职教师的最大指导时间。默认值：1265（STPCD）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 适用于兼职教师。默认值：100（全职）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to all timetable lessons unless overridden.
ast.target: 应用于所有课程表课程，除非单独覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable Saturday or Sunday for boarding or Saturday schools.
ast.target: 为寄宿学校或周六学校启用周六或周日。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum directed time for a full-time teacher. Default: 1265 (STPCD). Override for schools on different contracts.
ast.target: 全职教师的最大指导时间。默认值：1265（STPCD）。适用于不同合同的学校。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For part-time teachers. Your directed time maximum = contracted hours × this %. Default: 100 (full-time).
ast.target: 适用于兼职教师。您的最大指导时间 = 合同工时 × 此百分比。默认值：100（全职）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to all timetable lessons unless overridden on individual slots.
ast.target: 应用于所有课程表课程，除非在单个时间段覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download a weekly breakdown of directed hours as an Excel workbook, suitable for sharing with your union or school management.
ast.target: 下载指导时间的每周明细，作为Excel工作簿，适合与工会或学校管理层分享。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the guide note explaining how the tracker works and your statutory rights.
ast.target: 打开解释跟踪器工作原理和您法定权利的指南说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where lesson notes will be created

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Border on the top and bottom edge of each period band.
ast.target: 每个时间段带的顶部和底部边缘边框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Thickness of period band borders in pixels (1-4).
ast.target: 时间段带边框的粗细（像素，1-4）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colour of the day-column borders and row dividers.
ast.target: 日期列边框和行分隔线的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Thickness of the grid dividers in pixels (1-4).
ast.target: 网格分隔线的粗细（像素，1-4）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download timetable or date events as Excel or CSV into your Planner folder.
ast.target: 将课程表或日期事件下载为Excel或CSV格式到您的计划器文件夹。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Teacher Planner: could not create directed time guide note:
ast.target: 教师计划器：无法创建指导时间指南说明：

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 开始时间必须是HH:MM格式（例如08:50）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 结束时间必须是HH:MM格式（例如10:05）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Folder picker is not available in this environment.
ast.target: 此环境中文件夹选择器不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Folder picker is not available — please use a vault path.
ast.target: 文件夹选择器不可用——请使用保险库路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not open folder picker — please use a vault path.
ast.target: 无法打开文件夹选择器——请使用保险库路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Export failed - see console for details.
ast.target: 导出失败——详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Export failed — see console for details.
ast.target: 导出失败——详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: End date must be after start date.
ast.target: 结束日期必须在开始日期之后。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one school day.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个上学日。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请至少添加一个时间段。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: End date must be after the start date.
ast.target: 结束日期必须晚于开始日期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a date, period, and item.
ast.target: 请选择日期、时段和项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cumulative baseline — period type defaults, A/B week defaults, activity defaults, etc.
ast.target: 累积基线——时段类型默认值、A/B周默认值、活动默认值等。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create a new timetable from a chosen start date. The new template will run to the end of the academic year.
ast.target: 从选定的开始日期创建新的时间表。新模板将运行至学年结束。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ Start date is outside the academic year.
ast.target: ⚠️ 开始日期在学年范围之外。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How should this gap be handled?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Exports a detailed Excel workbook with a weekly breakdown and summary, suitable for sharing with your union or school management.
ast.target: 导出一个详细的Excel工作簿，包含每周明细和摘要，适合与您的工会或学校管理层分享。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ℹ️  How it works: Directed time is counted only from items placed in your planner. The tracker shows hours accrued to today and a projection based on future planned events. Keep your planner up to date for accurate figures.
ast.target: ℹ️  工作原理：定向时间仅根据您在规划器中放置的项目计算。跟踪器显示截至今日累计的小时数，以及基于未来已计划事件的预测。请保持您的规划器更新以获得准确数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️  This tracker is a guide only. Accuracy depends entirely on the information you enter. It does not constitute legal advice — always consult your union representative for formal disputes.
ast.target: ⚠️  此跟踪器仅供参考。准确性完全取决于您输入的信息。它不构成法律建议——对于正式争议，请始终咨询您的工会代表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No activities yet — add one below.
ast.target: 暂无活动——请在下方添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No holidays or INSET days added yet.
ast.target: 尚未添加假期或教师培训日。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No block types yet — add one below, or skip.
ast.target: 暂无时段类型——请在下方添加，或跳过。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✅  Your planner has been created and is now active. You can close this wizard at any time and finish configuring your timetable from the main view.
ast.target: ✅  您的规划器已创建并处于活动状态。您可以随时关闭此向导，并从主视图完成时间表的配置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your planner has not been saved yet. If you exit now, all progress will be lost and you will need to start the setup again.
ast.target: 您的计划尚未保存。如果现在退出，所有进度都将丢失，您需要重新开始设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Update this planner's name and date range. Holidays, INSET days, events and notes keep their own dates — only the planner window moves. The timetable and its A/B weeks realign to the new range.
ast.target: 更新此计划的名称和日期范围。假期、INSET日、活动和备注保留各自的日期——仅计划窗口移动。课程表及其A/B周将重新对齐到新范围。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Mark date ranges as holidays or INSET training days. Individual day columns are greyed out in the planner.
ast.target: 将日期范围标记为假期或INSET培训日。在计划中，单个日期列将显示为灰色。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All periods appear in the timetable editor. Colours and types are configured in School Day Blocks above.
ast.target: 所有时段都显示在课程表编辑器中。颜色和类型在上方的“学校日时段”中配置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define your subjects and class groups. Colours appear on lesson blocks in the week view.
ast.target: 定义您的科目和班级组。颜色将显示在周视图的课程时段上。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These activities count toward your directed time total. Add them to the planner by clicking any empty slot. Set a default duration so the tracker can calculate your hours automatically — or leave it blank to enter the duration each time.
ast.target: 这些活动计入您的定向时间总计。通过点击任何空槽位将它们添加到计划中。设置默认时长，以便追踪器可以自动计算您的小时数——或者留空以每次输入时长。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️  Items in this section appear in the planner but are excluded from the directed time count. Use these for personal appointments, reminders, or any non-directed activity.
ast.target: ⚠️  本部分中的项目会显示在计划中，但不计入定向时间计数。将这些用于个人预约、提醒或任何非定向活动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each planner has its own timetable, classes and academic year. Switch between planners here or create a new one.
ast.target: 每个计划都有自己的课程表、班级和学年。在此处切换计划或创建新计划。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No subjects yet. Click '+ Add subject' to start.
ast.target: 尚无科目。点击“+ 添加科目”开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No holidays or INSET days marked.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your changes have been saved and the planner has been updated.
ast.target: 您的更改已保存，计划已更新。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add a one-off class or activity into a specific period on a specific date.
ast.target: 在特定日期的特定时段中添加一次性课程或活动。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Switch to another planner before deleting this one
ast.target: 请先切换到另一个计划，然后再删除此计划
